field.expresion: date(calldate)
field.label: Fecha

field.expresion: date_format( calldate, '%H:%i:%s' )
field.label: hora

field.expresion: @newsrc:=(case when src != '' then src else (substring(channel,5,3)) end)
field.label: Origen

field.expresion: @newsrc
@internosrc := (case when length(@newsrc) = 3 then (select CONCAT(Nombre, ' ', apellido) from HTXUSERS where HTXUSERS.interno = @newsrc limit 1) end)

@empresasrc := ifnull((SELECT CCTCUENT.ctafan FROM CCTCONTA left join CCTCUENT on CCTCUENT.siscod = CCTCONTA.siscod and CCTCUENT.ctacod = CCTCONTA.ctacod WHERE length(@newsrc) != 3 and ( (replace(CONCAT(Telefono,'.',movil), ' ','') like CONCAT('%' ,trim(@newsrc) ,'%') and trim( @newsrc) != '' ) or (replace(CONCAT(Telefono,'.',movil), ' ','') like CONCAT('%' ,right(trim(@newsrc), 6 ) ,'%') and trim( @newsrc) != '' ) or (replace(CONCAT(Telefono,'.',movil), '-','') like CONCAT('%' ,trim(@newsrc) ,'%') and trim( @newsrc) != '' ) or (replace(CONCAT(Telefono,'.',movil), '-','') like CONCAT('%' ,right(trim(@newsrc), 6 ) ,'%') and trim( @newsrc) != '' )) group by CCTCONTA.siscod, CCTCONTA.ctacod limit 1),'')

@empresasrccta := ifnull((SELECT CCTCUENT.ctacod FROM CCTCONTA left join CCTCUENT on CCTCUENT.siscod = CCTCONTA.siscod and CCTCUENT.ctacod = CCTCONTA.ctacod WHERE length(@newsrc) != 3 and ( (replace(CONCAT(Telefono,'.',movil), ' ','') like CONCAT('%' ,trim(@newsrc) ,'%') and trim( @newsrc) != '' ) or (replace(CONCAT(Telefono,'.',movil), ' ','') like CONCAT('%' ,right(trim(@newsrc), 6 ) ,'%') and trim( @newsrc) != '' ) or (replace(CONCAT(Telefono,'.',movil), '-','') like CONCAT('%' ,trim(@newsrc) ,'%') and trim( @newsrc) != '' ) or (replace(CONCAT(Telefono,'.',movil), '-','') like CONCAT('%' ,right(trim(@newsrc), 6 ) ,'%') and trim( @newsrc) != '' )) group by CCTCONTA.siscod, CCTCONTA.ctacod limit 1),'')
field.label: empresaSrcCta
cuentaSrccta

field.expresion: @empresasrcsis := ifnull((SELECT CCTCUENT.siscod FROM CCTCONTA left join CCTCUENT on CCTCUENT.siscod = CCTCONTA.siscod and CCTCUENT.ctacod = CCTCONTA.ctacod WHERE length(@newsrc) != 3 and ( (replace(CONCAT(Telefono,'.',movil), ' ','') like CONCAT('%' ,trim(@newsrc) ,'%') and trim( @newsrc) != '' ) or (replace(CONCAT(Telefono,'.',movil), ' ','') like CONCAT('%' ,right(trim(@newsrc), 6 ) ,'%') and trim( @newsrc) != '' ) or (replace(CONCAT(Telefono,'.',movil), '-','') like CONCAT('%' ,trim(@newsrc) ,'%') and trim( @newsrc) != '' ) or (replace(CONCAT(Telefono,'.',movil), '-','') like CONCAT('%' ,right(trim(@newsrc), 6 ) ,'%') and trim( @newsrc) != '' )) group by CCTCONTA.siscod, CCTCONTA.ctacod limit 1),'')
field.label: empresaSrcSis
cuentaSrcsis

field.expresion: @ctasrc := CAST(IFNULL((CASE WHEN @empresasrccta = '' THEN @cuentasrccta ELSE @empresasrccta END), '') as CHAR(20))
field.label: ctaSRC

field.expresion: @sissrc := CAST(IFNULL((CASE WHEN @empresasrcsis = '' THEN @cuentasrcsis ELSE @empresasrcsis END), '') as CHAR(20))
field.label: sisSRC

field.expresion: @internodst := (case when length(dst) = 3 then (select CONCAT(Nombre, ' ', apellido) from HTXUSERS where HTXUSERS.interno = dst limit 1) end)

@empresadst := ifnull((SELECT CCTCUENT.ctafan FROM CCTCONTA left join CCTCUENT on CCTCUENT.siscod = CCTCONTA.siscod and CCTCUENT.ctacod = CCTCONTA.ctacod WHERE length(dst) != 3 and ( (replace(CONCAT(Telefono,'.',movil), ' ','') like CONCAT('%' ,trim(dst) ,'%') and trim(dst) != '' ) or (replace(CONCAT(Telefono,'.',movil), ' ','') like CONCAT('%' ,right(trim(dst), 6 ) ,'%') and trim(dst) != '' ) or (replace(CONCAT(Telefono,'.',movil), '-','') like CONCAT('%' ,trim(dst) ,'%') and trim( dst) != '' ) or (replace(CONCAT(Telefono,'.',movil), '-','') like CONCAT('%' ,right(trim(dst), 6 ) ,'%') and trim(dst) != '' )) group by CCTCONTA.siscod, CCTCONTA.ctacod limit 1),'')

@empresadstcta := ifnull((SELECT CCTCUENT.ctacod FROM CCTCONTA left join CCTCUENT on CCTCUENT.siscod = CCTCONTA.siscod and CCTCUENT.ctacod = CCTCONTA.ctacod WHERE length(dst) != 3 and ( (replace(CONCAT(Telefono,'.',movil), ' ','') like CONCAT('%' ,trim(dst) ,'%') and trim(dst) != '' ) or (replace(CONCAT(Telefono,'.',movil), ' ','') like CONCAT('%' ,right(trim(dst), 6 ) ,'%') and trim(dst) != '' ) or (replace(CONCAT(Telefono,'.',movil), '-','') like CONCAT('%' ,trim(dst) ,'%') and trim( dst) != '' ) or (replace(CONCAT(Telefono,'.',movil), '-','') like CONCAT('%' ,right(trim(dst), 6 ) ,'%') and trim(dst) != '' )) group by CCTCONTA.siscod, CCTCONTA.ctacod limit 1),'')
field.label: empresaDstcta
cuentaDstcta

field.expresion: @empresadstsis := ifnull((SELECT CCTCUENT.siscod FROM CCTCONTA left join CCTCUENT on CCTCUENT.siscod = CCTCONTA.siscod and CCTCUENT.ctacod = CCTCONTA.ctacod WHERE length(dst) != 3 and ( (replace(CONCAT(Telefono,'.',movil), ' ','') like CONCAT('%' ,trim(dst) ,'%') and trim(dst) != '' ) or (replace(CONCAT(Telefono,'.',movil), ' ','') like CONCAT('%' ,right(trim(dst), 6 ) ,'%') and trim(dst) != '' ) or (replace(CONCAT(Telefono,'.',movil), '-','') like CONCAT('%' ,trim(dst) ,'%') and trim( dst) != '' ) or (replace(CONCAT(Telefono,'.',movil), '-','') like CONCAT('%' ,right(trim(dst), 6 ) ,'%') and trim(dst) != '' )) group by CCTCONTA.siscod, CCTCONTA.ctacod limit 1),'')
field.label: empresaDstsis
cuentaDstsis

field.expresion: @ctadst := CAST(IFNULL((CASE WHEN @empresadstcta = '' THEN @cuentadstcta ELSE @empresadstcta END), '') as CHAR(20))
field.label: ctaDST

field.expresion: @sisdst := CAST(IFNULL((CASE WHEN @empresadstsis = '' THEN @cuentadstsis ELSE @empresadstsis END), '') as CHAR(20))
field.label: sisDST

field.expresion: CAST(CONCAT(@ctasrc, @ctadst) as CHAR(20))
field.label: nros cuentas

field.expresion: CAST(CONCAT(@sissrc, @sisdst) as CHAR(20))
field.label: nros sis

field.expresion: sec_to_time(duration)
field.label: Tiempo

field.expresion: case when userfield != '' then SUBSTRING_INDEX(userfield, ':', -1) end
field.label: Audio
